targets.rawSql:
SELECT
    if(country = '', 'Unknown', toString(country)) AS country_code,
    uniqExact(remote_ip)                           AS unique_ip_count
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  -- 暂时注释掉 IP 过滤，先看全局分布
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY country_code
ORDER BY unique_ip_count DESC

WITH first_seen AS (
  SELECT
    remote_ip,
    min(ts) AS first_seen
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
  GROUP BY remote_ip
),
new_ips_per_bucket AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfMinute(first_seen) AS bucket,   -- 这一行可以改成你想要的时间粒度
    count() AS new_ips
  FROM first_seen
  GROUP BY bucket
)
SELECT
  bucket AS time,
  sum(new_ips) OVER (ORDER BY bucket ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cumulative_unique_ips
FROM new_ips_per_bucket
ORDER BY bucket;

SELECT $__timeInterval(ts) as "time", count(ts) FROM "logs"."caddy_requests"
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
  GROUP BY time

SELECT
  method                        AS method,
  count()                       AS request_count
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY method
ORDER BY request_count DESC

SELECT
  quantile(0.95)(duration_ms) AS current_p95_response_time_ms
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ts BETWEEN $__fromTime AND $__toTime
  AND status   != 101
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )

SELECT
    host                            AS Application,
    uniqExact(remote_ip)            AS unique_ip_count
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY Application
ORDER BY unique_ip_count DESC

SELECT
    host                            AS Application,
    sum(duration_ms)/1000                AS total_duration_seconds
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND status != 101
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY Application
ORDER BY total_duration_seconds DESC

SELECT
    host                            AS Application,
    sum(bytes_sent)                 AS total_bytes_sent
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )

  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'

        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY Application
ORDER BY total_bytes_sent DESC

SELECT
    host                                       AS Application,
    round(countIf(status >= 500) / count() * 100, 2) AS failure_rate_percent
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY Application
ORDER BY failure_rate_percent DESC

SELECT
    sum(bytes_sent) / (($__toTime) - ($__fromTime)) AS bytes_per_second
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR

        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )

SELECT
  count() / dateDiff('second', $__fromTime, $__toTime) AS avg_requests_per_second
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )

SELECT
   toString(status) AS status,
  count()                       AS request_count
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY request_count DESC

SELECT

    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(ts)             AS "time",
  uniqExact(remote_ip)            AS unique_ip_count
FROM "logs"."caddy_requests"
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(ts)             AS "time",
  sum(duration_ms)           AS total_duration_ms
FROM "logs"."caddy_requests"
WHERE ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR

SELECT
    $__timeInterval(ts) AS time,
    sum(bytes_sent) / $__interval_s AS bytes_per_second
FROM logs.caddy_requests
WHERE
    $__timeFilter(ts)
    AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
    AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY
    time
ORDER BY
    time ASC

SELECT

FROM logs.caddy_requests

  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR

    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(ts)             AS "time",
  uniqExact(remote_ip)            AS unique_ip_count
FROM "logs"."caddy_requests"
WHERE uri like '/upgrade%'
  AND ( ts >= $__fromTime AND ts <= $__toTime )
  AND match(host, '^(${Application:regex})$')
  AND remote_ip LIKE '%${IP}%'
  AND (
    ('${Network}' = 'Global') OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internal' AND (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    )) OR
    ('${Network}' = 'Internet' AND NOT (
        remote_ip LIKE '10.%' OR 
        remote_ip LIKE '172.16.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.17.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.18.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.19.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.20.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.21.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.22.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.23.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.24.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.25.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.26.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.27.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '172.28.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.29.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.30.%' OR remote_ip LIKE '172.31.%' OR
        remote_ip LIKE '192.168.%'
    ))
  )
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;

list.label: Application
list.name: Application
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT host FROM logs.caddy_requests ORDER BY host
